raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Context check-in","name":"What feels most worth talking through today, Carlos?","description":"Lets Carlos set the agenda before feedback lands.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"self_read","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quality examples","name":"What specific work has made the quality bar feel clearest to you lately?","description":"Surfaces concrete examples he is using to judge quality.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback translation","name":"What changed in your process after the last round of feedback?","description":"Checks whether feedback became behavior, not just understanding.","purpose":"competency","stage":"evidence","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Good work definition","name":"How do you define good work for your role right now, Carlos?","description":"Tests his current internal standard for junior brand design work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Bar in practice","name":"What does meeting the bar look like in the work you hand over?","description":"Forces a concrete description of observable quality, not abstract intent.","purpose":"competency","stage":"gap_naming","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Growth blocker","name":"What is making growth feel stuck for you right now?","description":"Surfaces the main constraint on his development from his perspective.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback specificity","name":"What kind of feedback is hardest for you to use?","description":"Finds where critique stays vague, late, or hard to apply.","purpose":"topic","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quality habits","name":"What part of your process most affects the quality of the final output?","description":"Identifies the leverage point in his day-to-day design workflow.","purpose":"competency","stage":"cause","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Practice commitment","name":"What one habit do you want to practice before we meet again?","description":"Closes on a concrete near-term behavior change with ownership.","purpose":"competency","stage":"commit","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
